Class-Cleric — Female Dorn Human Cleric: 20
Strength: 11 (0) Dexterity: 8 (-1) Constitution: 17 (3) Intelligence: 14 (2) Wisdom: 15 (2) Charisma: 16 (3)
Background: Acolyte Heroic Path: None Alignment: Lawful Good
Ability Boosts: Strength: 1; Wisdom: 2 Experience: 374599/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 165/330
Ability Notes:
Dorn Ability Adjustment: +1 Strength
Human Ability Adjustment: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Knife Fighter: +1 Dexterity
Scavenger: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Intelligence, Wisdom)
Suspicious: +1 Intelligence
Ability Boosts: 3 to distribute
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: 6
Feat Count: General: 6 Selectable Feature Count: Cleric (Divine Domain)
Feats: Knife Fighter; Learned; Paranoid; Polyglot; Scavenger; Suspicious Dorn Human Features: Dorn Ability Adjustment; Dorn Skills; Human Ability Adjustment; Human Feat Bonus; Human Skills Cleric Features: Armor Proficiency (Medium/Shield); Astirax Servant; Aura Of Darkness; Bestial Astirax Servant; Bonus Proficiency (Soldier Legate); Bonus Proficiency (Witch Taker); Channel Divinity; Dark God's Blessing; Dark Warrior; Destroy Undead; Dire Bodyguard; Divine Domain; Divine Intervention; Dominate Undead; Dread Avatar; Ferocious Blow; Impervious To Magic; Improved Astirax Bond; Keeper Of Obsidian Domain; Mage Hunter; Master Mage Hunter; Necromantic Arts; Potent Spellcasting; Ritual Casting; Save Proficiency (Charisma/Wisdom); Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from History, Insight, Medicine, Persuasion, Religion); Soldier Legate Domain; Spellcasting; Turn Undead; Weapon Proficiency (Simple); Witch Taker Domain Acolyte Features: Language (Choose 2 from any); Shelter Of The Faithful; Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion)
Feature Notes:
Divine Domain: 1 selection
Human Feat Bonus: +1 general feat
Astirax Servant: Can communicate telepathically 1 mile with a bound astirax
Aura Of Darkness: Can create a 20' radius of darkness that others cannot see through for 1 min
Bestial Astirax Servant: Can communicate telepathically 100' with a bound astirax
Dark Warrior: Can use a bonus action to make an additional attack 2 times per long rest
Dire Bodyguard: Adjacent foes suffer disadvantage on attacks on others; such attacks allow self to use a reaction to make a melee attack on the attacker
Ferocious Blow: Can use Channel Divinity to inflict +2d6 HP thunder, also inflicting a 10' push and knocked prone on a Medium or smaller target
Improved Astirax Bond: Astirax gains +6 armor class, attack, damage, and proficient saves and skills and can extend its Scent Magic range to 1 mile for 1 min once per day
Shelter Of The Faithful: Can receive aid from temples of Izrador and fellow believers
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; History; Insight; Intimidation; Religion; Survival
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) 5 Insight: (wis) 14 Performance: (cha) 3
Animal Handling: (wis) 2 Intimidation: (cha) 9 Persuasion: (cha) 3
Arcana: (int) 2 Investigation: (int) 2 Religion: (int) 8
Athletics: (str) 0 Medicine: (wis) 2 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) -1
Deception: (cha) 3 Nature: (int) 2 Stealth: (dex) -1
History: (int) 8 Perception: (wis) 2 Survival: (wis) 8
Languages: Clan Dialect; Erenlander; Halfling; Norther; Shadow Tongue
Skill Notes:
Dorn Skills: Skill Proficiency (Survival)/Language (Norther)
Human Skills: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)/Language (Erenlander; Choose 1 from any)
Learned: Language (Choose 1 from any)/Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from History, Religion)
Suspicious: Skill Proficiency (Insight)/+6 Insight
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Learned: Can read and write
Polyglot: Gains general language understanding after listening for 1 day, and a successful DC 15 Intelligence each week gives fluency
Scavenger: Successful DC 15 Perception after a battle recovers all spent ammo, and a successful DC 12 Investigation in a settlement scavenges weapon or armor materials worth up to 3d10+2 GP
Suspicious: +6 passive Perception/Successful DC 20 Investigation reveals flaws in a creature's story details
Combat
Hit Points: 95 Initiative: -1 Armor Class: 12 Attacks Per Round: 1
Armor Proficiency: Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Halberd; Longsword; Martial Weapons; Rapier; Shortsword; Simple
Armor: Padded Shield: Shield Weapons: Dagger (+6 1d4 R20/60); Unarmed (+6 1); Urutuk (+6 1d6 R20/60)
Combat Notes:
Bonus Proficiency (Soldier Legate): Weapon Proficiency (Martial Weapons)
Bonus Proficiency (Witch Taker): Weapon Proficiency (Halberd; Longsword; Rapier; Shortsword)
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +60
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: -1
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: -1
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: -1
Master Mage Hunter: Increased Mage Hunter effects
Dark God's Blessing: Killing a sentient creature restores 4d6 hit points to self
Destroy Undead: Turning destroys undead up to CR 4
Dominate Undead: R30' Can use Channel Energy to control undead (save Wisdom neg) for 1 hr
Knife Fighter: Dagger crits on a roll of 18-20, and a critical hit inflicts disadvantage on attacks for 1 rd
Mage Hunter: R60' Can use Channel Divinity to inflict disadvantage on the concentration saves of enemny casters and give advantage on saves vs. their spells (save Wisdom neg) for 1 min
Paranoid: Cannot be surprised when asleep/Can take a free Dodge action during initiative
Turn Undead: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to make undead flee (save DC 16 Wisdom negates) for 1 min
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: 9; Constitution: 3; Dexterity: -1; Intelligence: 2; Strength: 0; Wisdom: 8
Save Notes: Dread Avatar: Has resistance to nonmagical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing and immunity to radiant
Magic
Spell Slots: C0: 5; C1: 4; C2: 3; C3: 3; C4: 3; C5: 3; C6: 2; C7: 2; C8: 1; C9: 1 Attack: C: 8 Spell DC: C: 16
Spells:
Bane (C1 [Soldier Legate Domain] Ench): R30' 3 targets suffer -1d4 on attacks and saving throws (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Bestow Curse (C3 [Keeper Of Obsidian Domain] Necr): Touched suffers a choice of disadvantage on specified ability rolls, disadvantage on attacks on self, requiring a successful Wisdom save to take any action, or +1d8 HP necrotic from self attacks (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the maximum duration to 10 min, 8 hr, 24 hr, or permanently at level 4, 5, 7, or 9]
Bind/Banish Astirax (C3 [Keeper Of Obsidian Domain] Divi): R200' Reveals the presence of astiraxes for concentation up to 10 min and allows controlling for a year and a day or inflicting 4d12 HP radiant on those within 10' (save Wisdom negates, with advantage if possessing an animal, and 3 saves within 24 hr gives immunity to binding by self)
Bind/Banish Astirax (C3 [Witch Taker Domain] Divi): R200' Reveals the presence of astiraxes for concentation up to 10 min and allows controlling for a year and a day or inflicting 4d12 HP radiant on those within 10' (save Wisdom negates, with advantage if possessing an animal, and 3 saves within 24 hr gives immunity to binding by self)
Blight (C4 [Keeper Of Obsidian Domain] Necr): R30' Inflicts 8d8 HP necrotic (save Constitution half; plant target has disadvantage on the save and suffers maximum damage on failure) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Blindness/Deafness (C2 [Keeper Of Obsidian Domain] Necr): R30' Inflicts a choice of blindness or deafness (save Constitution ends) for 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Chill Touch (C0 [Necromantic Arts] Necr): R120' Ranged spell inflicts 4d8 HP necrotic and target cannot regain hit points for 1 rd; undead also suffer disadvantage vs. self attack for 1 rd
Cloudkill (C5 [Keeper Of Obsidian Domain] Conj): R120' 20' radius inflicts 5d8 HP poison (save Constitution half) and moves away 10' per rd for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Cone Of Cold (C5 [Soldier Legate Domain] Evoc): 60' cone inflicts 8d8 HP cold (save Constitution half) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Confusion (C4 [Witch Taker Domain] Ench): R90' Creatures in a 10' radius randomly: 10% wander; 50% do nothing; 20% attack an adjacent creature; 20% act normally (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level increases the radius by 5']
Contagion (C5 [Keeper Of Obsidian Domain] Necr): Touched suffers poisoned (save Constitution each turn; 3 successes ends, and 3 failures inflict a choice of disease for 7 days)
Counterspell (C3 [Impervious To Magic] Abju): R60' Negates foe casting up to spell level 3; successful DC 10 + spell level negates a higher-level spell [+Level negates any spell of equal or lesser level]
Counterspell (C3 [Witch Taker Domain] Abju): R60' Negates foe casting up to spell level 3; successful DC 10 + spell level negates a higher-level spell [+Level negates any spell of equal or lesser level]
Darkvision (C2 [Soldier Legate Domain] Tran): Willing touched sees 60' in darkness for 8 hr
Detect Magic (C1 [Keeper Of Obsidian Domain] Divi): R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min [R]
Detect Magic (C1 [Witch Taker Domain] Divi): R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min [R]
Detect Thoughts (C2 [Witch Taker Domain] Divi): R30' Reveals targets' surface thoughts and allows probing deeper (save Wisdom ends) for concentration up to 1 min
Disguise Self (C1 [Witch Taker Domain] Illu): Changes the appearance of self body and clothing for 1 hr; physical investigation detects the illusion
Dominate Person (C5 [Witch Taker Domain] Ench): R60' Target humanoid obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 6, 7, or 8]
Freedom Of Movement (C4 [Witch Taker Domain] Abju): Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and can escape from restraints for 1 hr
Haste (C3 [Soldier Legate Domain] Tran): R30' Willing target gains double Speed, +2 AC, advantage on Dexterity, and an additional action for concentration up to 1 min and suffers 1 rd of lethargy afterward
Hellish Rebuke (C1 [Soldier Legate Domain] Evoc): R60' Cast as a reaction, inflicts 2d10 HP fire on a successful attacker (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Hold Monster (C5 [Soldier Legate Domain] Ench): R90' Immobilizes the target creature (save Wisdom ends) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Inflict Wounds (C1 [Keeper Of Obsidian Domain] Necr): Touch inflicts 3d10 HP necrotic [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Magic Weapon (C2 [Soldier Legate Domain] Tran): Gives touched weapon a +1 magic bonus for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level gives a +2 or +3 bonus at level 4 or 6]
Phantasmal Killer (C4 [Keeper Of Obsidian Domain] Illu): R120' Target perceives a personal horror (save Wisdom negates) that frightens and inflicts 4d10 HP psychic per rd (save Wisdom ends) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Ray Of Enfeeblement (C2 [Witch Taker Domain] Necr): R60' Ranged spell inflicts half damage with Strength weapons (save Constitution ends) for concentration up to 1 min
Regenerate (C7 [Soldier Legate Domain] Tran): Touched regains 4d8+15 HP, plus 1 HP per rd for 1 hr, and reattaches or regrows severed parts after 2 min
Scrying (C5 [Witch Taker Domain] Divi): Self sees and hears a chosen target (save Wisdom, modified by degree of familiarity, negates for 24 hr) for concentration up to 10 min
See Invisibility (C2 [Keeper Of Obsidian Domain] Divi): Reveals invisible and ethereal creatures and objects for 1 hr
Stoneskin (C4 [Soldier Legate Domain] Abju): Touched gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage for concentration up to 1 hr
Vampiric Touch (C3 [Soldier Legate Domain] Necr): Touch inflicts 3d6 HP, and self regains half as many, for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Magic Notes:
Channel Divinity: Can use a Channel Divinity effect 3 times per short rest
Divine Intervention: Has a 100% chance to gain help from Izrador once per week
Impervious To Magic: Can use a reaction to cast Counterspell
Necromantic Arts: Knows the Chill Touch cantrip
Potent Spellcasting: +2 HP Cleric cantrip damage
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the cleric spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 1 available vs. 3 allocated
